name: Tactical Services, Inc.
summary: Tactical Services, Inc., a development stage company, focuses on providing TVs streaming advertisements for the customers lining up on the outside of the nightclubs in the United states. It focuses on showcasing pictures of club scenes, special events, deals on drink specials, and advertisements from local businesses and other companies. The company intends to sell advertisements for local restaurants, cigarette companies, alcohol companies, clothing companies, ads for sports and entertainment events, etc. Tactical Services, Inc. was founded in 2012 and is based in Puerto Plata, Dominican Republic.
